project.name: dony
project.description: Marketplace P2P pour transport de colis vers l'Afrique via voyageurs

backend.docker-up: cd dony-back && docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d
backend.docker-down: cd dony-back && docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml down
backend.db-shell: docker exec -it dony_db psql -U dony -d dony_dev

frontend.generate: cd dony_app && flutter pub run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs
frontend.clean: cd dony_app && flutter clean && flutter pub get

rules: Cross-package communication via Spring Events only
Shared code in common/ package only
Cancellation logic in dedicated cancellation/ package
Each feature must have bloc/, data/, and presentation/ subdirectories
State management via flutter_bloc only (no setState)
Navigation via GoRouter only (no direct Navigator)
HTTP via Dio only (no http package)

critical: Never store secrets in code or git
Always validate server-side even if validated client-side
Never expose direct KYC file URLs (presigned URLs only)
Never capture Stripe PaymentIntent without DeliveryConfirmedEvent

migrations: Always create new V(n+1) migration for changes
Never modify or delete audit_log entries (immutable)
entities: UUIDs for IDs (not SERIAL or BIGINT)

backend.events: Use Spring Application Events for cross-package communication

frontend.states: Use sealed class pattern: Initial, Loading, Success, Error
frontend.offline: Store offline QR scans in Hive, sync on reconnection
frontend.gps: Capture GPS at exact moment of photo, write to EXIF

backend.build: Build JAR on merge to main
backend.deploy: Deploy to Hetzner VPS via SSH

frontend.build: Build APK/IPA on merge to main
frontend.deploy: Upload to Play Store / App Store

production.infrastructure: Hetzner VPS CX31 + Docker Compose + Nginx

storyImplementationOrder: Epic 2 (Auth/KYC) - Must be complete before Epics 3, 4, 5
Story 6.1 (Stripe Spike) - Must be complete in isolation before other Epic 6 stories
Epic 7 (QR Tracking) - Depends on Epic 6 (payment creates escrow)
criticalRules: Never physical DELETE business entities (soft delete only)
Never inject services across packages (use Spring Events)
Never use setState in Flutter (BLoC only)
Never expose direct KYC URLs (presigned only)
Never capture Stripe PaymentIntent without DeliveryConfirmedEvent
